params.name: enterpriseContractPolicy
params.value: {"name":"Default","description":"Includes rules for levels 1, 2 \u0026 3 of SLSA v0.1. This is the default config used for new Konflux applications. Available collections are defined in https://redhat-appstudio.github.io/docs.stonesoup.io/ec-policies/release_policy.html#_available_rule_collections. If a different policy configuration is desired, this resource can serve as a starting point. See the docs on how to include and exclude rules https://redhat-appstudio.github.io/docs.stonesoup.io/ec-policies/policy_configuration.html#_including_and_excluding_rules.","sources":[{"name":"Default","policy":["oci::quay.io/conforma/release-policy:konflux@sha256:be53571e210f76978fb3d89233aa9740cde4e3c66707db029728a81479ad3f73"],"data":["oci::quay.io/konflux-ci/tekton-catalog/data-acceptable-bundles:latest","github.com/release-engineering/rhtap-ec-policy//data"],"config":{"include":["@slsa3"]}}],"publicKey":"k8s://openshift-pipelines/public-key"}

pipelineSpec.description: Tekton pipeline to release Snapshots to an external registry.

params.description: The namespaced name (namespace/name) of the Release custom resource initiating this pipeline execution
params.name: release

params.description: The namespaced name (namespace/name) of the releasePlan
params.name: releasePlan

params.description: The namespaced name (namespace/name) of the releasePlanAdmission
params.name: releasePlanAdmission

params.description: The namespaced name (namespace/name) of the releaseServiceConfig
params.name: releaseServiceConfig

params.description: The namespaced name (namespace/name) of the snapshot
params.name: snapshot

params.description: JSON representation of the EnterpriseContractPolicy
params.name: enterpriseContractPolicy

params.description:
Extra rule data to be merged into the policy specified in params.enterpriseContractPolicy. Use syntax
"key1=value1,key2=value2..."
params.name: enterpriseContractExtraRuleData

params.description: The git revision to be used when consuming the verify-conforma task
params.name: verify_ec_task_git_revision

params.description: The url to the git repo where the release-service-catalog tasks to be used are stored
params.name: taskGitUrl

params.description: The revision in the taskGitUrl repo to be used
params.name: taskGitRevision

params.description: The OCI repository where the Trusted Artifacts are stored
params.name: ociStorage

params.description: oras options to pass to Trusted Artifacts calls
params.name: orasOptions

params.description: Flag to enable debug logging in trusted artifacts. Set to a non-empty string to enable
params.name: trustedArtifactsDebug

params.description: The location where data will be stored
params.name: dataDir

params.name: SNAPSHOT

params.description:
Name of the policy configuration (EnterpriseContractConfiguration
object) to use. `namespace/name` or `name` syntax supported. If
namespace is omitted the namespace where the task runs is used.
params.name: POLICY_CONFIGURATION

params.description:
Path to a directory containing SSL certs to be used when communicating
with external services. This is useful when using the integrated registry
and a local instance of Rekor on a development cluster which may use
certificates issued by a not-commonly trusted root CA. In such cases,
"/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount" is a good value. Multiple
paths can be provided by using the ":" separator.
params.name: SSL_CERT_DIR

params.description:
Public key used to verify signatures. Must be a valid k8s cosign
reference, e.g. k8s://my-space/my-secret where my-secret contains
the expected cosign.pub attribute.
params.name: PUBLIC_KEY

params.description: Number of parallel workers to use for policy evaluation.
params.name: WORKERS

params.description: The name of the ConfigMap to read CA bundle data from.
params.name: CA_TRUST_CONFIGMAP_NAME

params.description: The name of the key in the ConfigMap that contains the CA bundle data.
params.name: CA_TRUST_CONFIG_MAP_KEY

params.description: Merge additional Rego variables into the policy data. Use syntax "key=value,key2=value2..."
params.name: EXTRA_RULE_DATA

params.description: Reduce the Snapshot to only the component whose build caused the Snapshot to be created
params.name: SINGLE_COMPONENT

params.description: PipelineRun ID
params.name: SINGLE_COMPONENT_CUSTOM_RESOURCE

params.description:
A boolean flag that determines whether the result of the test will mark the TaskRun as passing or not.
Swap to false to make the IntegrationTestScenario informative.

Setting to false is useful on specific conditions but will always mark the integration test as successful and
humans will tend to ignore the test results if they failed. Use with caution.
params.name: STRICT

pipelineSpec.description:
This pipeline is ideal for building container images from a Containerfile while maintaining trust after pipeline customization.

_Uses `buildah` to create a container image leveraging [trusted artifacts](https://konflux-ci.dev/architecture/ADR/0036-trusted-artifacts.html). It also optionally creates a source image and runs some build-time tests. Information is shared between tasks using OCI artifacts instead of PVCs. EC will pass the [`trusted_task.trusted`](https://conforma.dev/docs/policy/packages/release_trusted_task.html#trusted_task__trusted) policy as long as all data used to build the artifact is generated from trusted tasks.
This pipeline is pushed as a Tekton bundle to [quay.io](https://quay.io/repository/konflux-ci/tekton-catalog/pipeline-docker-build-oci-ta?tab=tags)_

params.description: Source Repository URL
params.name: git-url

params.description: Revision of the Source Repository
params.name: revision

params.description: Fully Qualified Output Image
params.name: output-image

params.description: Path to the source code of an application's component from where to build image.
params.name: path-context

params.description: Path to the Dockerfile inside the context specified by parameter path-context
params.name: dockerfile

params.description: Skip checks against built image
params.name: skip-checks

params.description: Execute the build with network isolation
params.name: hermetic

params.description: Build dependencies to be prefetched
params.name: prefetch-input

params.description: Image tag expiration time, time values could be something like 1h, 2d, 3w for hours, days, and weeks, respectively.
params.name: image-expires-after

params.description: Build a source image.
params.name: build-source-image

params.description: Add built image into an OCI image index
params.name: build-image-index

params.description: The format for the resulting image's mediaType. Valid values are oci or docker.
params.name: buildah-format

params.description: Enable cache proxy configuration
params.name: enable-cache-proxy

params.description: Array of --build-arg values ("arg=value" strings) for buildah
params.name: build-args

params.description: Path to a file with build arguments for buildah, see https://www.mankier.com/1/buildah-build#--build-arg-file
params.name: build-args-file

params.description: Whether to enable privileged mode, should be used only with remote VMs
params.name: privileged-nested

It also optionally creates a source image and runs some build-time tests. Information is shared between tasks using OCI artifacts instead of PVCs. EC will pass the [`trusted_task.trusted`](https://conforma.dev/docs/policy/packages/release_trusted_task.html#trusted_task__trusted) policy as long as all data used to build the artifact is generated from trusted tasks.
This pipeline is pushed as a Tekton bundle to [quay.io](https://quay.io/repository/konflux-ci/tekton-catalog/pipeline-docker-build-oci-ta?tab=tags)_

params.description: Source Repository URL
params.name: git-url

params.description: Revision of the Source Repository
params.name: revision

params.description: Fully Qualified Output Image
params.name: output-image

params.description: Path to the source code of an application's component from where to build image.
params.name: path-context

params.description: Path to the Dockerfile inside the context specified by parameter path-context
params.name: dockerfile

params.description: Skip checks against built image
params.name: skip-checks

params.description: Execute the build with network isolation
params.name: hermetic

params.description: Build dependencies to be prefetched
params.name: prefetch-input

params.description: Image tag expiration time, time values could be something like 1h, 2d, 3w for hours, days, and weeks, respectively.
params.name: image-expires-after

params.description: Build a source image.
params.name: build-source-image

params.description: Add built image into an OCI image index
params.name: build-image-index

params.description: The format for the resulting image's mediaType. Valid values are oci or docker.
params.name: buildah-format

params.description: Enable cache proxy configuration
params.name: enable-cache-proxy

params.description: Array of --build-arg values ("arg=value" strings) for buildah
params.name: build-args

params.description: Path to a file with build arguments for buildah, see https://www.mankier.com/1/buildah-build#--build-arg-file
params.name: build-args-file

params.description: Whether to enable privileged mode, should be used only with remote VMs
params.name: privileged-nested
